headline: Medtronic CE Mark For Stealth AXiS Raises Questions On Valuation And Growth
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has received CE Mark approval for its Stealth AXiS surgical system. The clearance extends access in Europe to a robotics and AI-powered navigation platform for spine and cranial procedures. The system integrates planning, navigation, and robotics into a single solution, including segmental tracking during surgery. For investors watching medical technology, Stealth AXiS fits within Medtronic's core focus on surgical solutions and neurosurgery tools. The CE Mark gives the...
